title: Waiting for the Carnival
original_title: Estou Me Guardando para Quando o Carnaval Chegar
overview: A documentary film about the Brazilian town of Toritama, the self-proclaimed capital of jeans. The workers of the city’s self-managed small businesses only get one real break from their self-exploiting lives in the textile business: the annual Carnival.

trailers.title: En Attendant le Carnaval - Bande Annonce [VOST]
